description.platform_architect: Owns platform architecture, global configuration, and high-risk authorization boundaries.
description.security_governance_officer: Owns security governance, audit review, and control policy oversight.
description.system_operations_controller: Owns runtime operations, service reliability, and system control actions.
description.tenant_operations_manager: Owns tenant lifecycle operations, account governance, and business-side handling.
description.support_response_officer: Owns support response, ticket handling, and customer-facing issue coordination.
description.observer: Read-only role for beta, demo, review, and observation scenarios.

hints.locale: Change the display language for the admin portal.
hints.theme: Choose light, dark, or system appearance.
hints.density: Adjust spacing for compact or comfortable workflows.
hints.fontSize: Adjust text size for reading comfort.

platformOverview.label: Operation Overview
platformOverview.description: Core operating metrics, key trends across business domains, and platform health.

opsTodos.label: Ops Todos
opsTodos.description: Reviews, alerts, and operating tasks that need manual handling.

tenants.label: Tenant Profile
tenants.description: Manage tenant profiles, status, lifecycle, and operating notes.

accounts.label: Account System
accounts.description: Search accounts across tenants and manage status, security, and contacts.

verifications.label: Identity Verification
verifications.description: Review organization credentials, approvals, rejections, and rechecks.

adminRoles.label: Platform Roles
adminRoles.description: Maintain platform autonomy roles, role status, and role authorization.

servicePlans.label: Service Plans
servicePlans.description: Manage Free, Pro, and Enterprise service plans with quotas, prices, and sales scope.

productSolutions.label: Solutions
productSolutions.description: Compose capabilities into industry scenarios and define solution boundaries.

products.label: Product Capabilities
products.description: Manage composable, grantable, and metered platform, agent, model, and integration capabilities.

promotions.label: Marketing Offers
promotions.description: Configure coupon and discount campaigns with product, plan, and redemption rules.

commerceOverview.label: Commercial Overview
commerceOverview.description: Operating metrics and risk snapshots across subscriptions, orders, payments, billing, invoices, usage, and promotions.

subscriptions.label: Subscription Management
subscriptions.description: Operate tenant service entitlement instances, renewals, suspensions, cancellations, and quota risks.

orders.label: Orders
orders.description: Search order lists and details, track payment status, and handle exceptions.

usageMetering.label: Usage Billing
usageMetering.description: Review usage by tenant, product, and plan, and maintain metering rules and alerts.

promotionRedemptions.label: Promotion Usage
promotionRedemptions.description: Review coupon usage, discount redemption statistics, and related orders.

serviceMonitor.label: Service Monitoring
serviceMonitor.description: Review response time, error rate, availability, and alert rules.

modelPlatform.label: Model Platform
modelPlatform.description: Maintain LLM providers, API keys, rate limits, timeouts, and endpoints.

modelGrants.label: Model Authorization
modelGrants.description: Configure model access, quotas, and routing priority by product, tenant, and plan.

skills.label: Skill Market
skills.description: Register and manage callable agent skills, endpoints, publishing, and runtime status.

billing.label: Billing Center
billing.description: Manage bill generation, receivables confirmation, exceptions, and offline invoice entries.

payments.label: Payments
payments.description: Review online and offline payment ledgers, reconciliation, bill links, and notable flows.

invoices.label: Invoices
invoices.description: Track offline invoice registration, delivery, reversals, voiding, and bill links.

tickets.label: Ticket Center
tickets.description: Handle user tickets, manual assignment, status flow, and feedback closure.

announcements.label: Messages
announcements.description: Publish platform announcements and targeted notices, and review delivery history.

auditLogs.label: Audit Logs
auditLogs.description: Trace key admin operations by operator, time, and target.

platformAutonomy.label: Platform Overview
platformAutonomy.description: Show platform autonomy health, key metrics, risks, and governance entries.

platformAdmins.label: Platform Users
platformAdmins.description: Manage internal platform autonomy users, not tenant end users.

adminPermissions.label: Permission Policy
adminPermissions.description: Manage platform autonomy permissions, groups, policy bindings, and authorization scope.

platformSecrets.label: Secret Store
platformSecrets.description: Manage platform-level secrets, credentials, service tokens, and sensitive config references.

platformJobs.label: Job Scheduler
platformJobs.description: Manage platform background jobs, async queues, executions, failed retries, and schedule status.

maintenanceWindows.label: Maintenance Windows
maintenanceWindows.description: Declare and manage platform maintenance windows: schedule, run, complete or cancel, and reconcile actual end time.

approvalCenter.label: Approval Center
approvalCenter.description: Handle sensitive operation approvals, permission requests, secret requests, and high-risk change confirmations.

riskRecords.label: Risk Records
riskRecords.description: Manage tenant risk assessments: create, follow up, review, and tag.

complianceEvents.label: Compliance Events
complianceEvents.description: Track platform and tenant compliance events: assign handlers, resolve or dismiss, and keep evidence.

systemParameters.label: System Parameters
systemParameters.description: Planned module for platform parameters, defaults, runtime parameters, and global policy parameters.

dataDictionaries.label: Data Dictionaries
dataDictionaries.description: Planned module for system dictionaries, enum items, business options, and configurable static data.

featureToggles.label: Feature Toggles
featureToggles.description: Planned module for feature flags, rollout switches, experiment switches, and risk isolation switches.

notificationChannels.label: Notification Channels
notificationChannels.description: Planned module for platform notification channels, template bindings, and sending configuration.

notificationLogs.label: Sending Records
notificationLogs.description: Planned module for platform notification sending records, receipts, and failed retries.

sidebar.title: Console
sidebar.description: Self-service account, tenant, member, and subscription management

overview.label: Data Overview
overview.description: Tenant status, subscription expiry, usage, and quick entries

todos.label: Todo Items
todos.description: Key actions waiting for the current tenant

profile.label: Profile
profile.description: Avatar, name, password, phone, and email binding

personalTenant.label: My Tenant
personalTenant.description: Personal tenant information, visible for personal tenants

organization.label: Organization Info
organization.description: Organization name, logo, bio, verification, and locale

members.label: Member Management
members.description: Invites, access review, and team membership

roles.label: Role Management
roles.description: Tenant roles such as admin, member, and readonly

subscription.label: Service Subscription
subscription.description: Plan details, upgrade, and downgrade entry

quotas.label: Usage Quotas
quotas.description: Resource progress for API calls, storage, and more

modelPlatform.label: Model Platform
modelPlatform.description: Online models, private models, and endpoints

security.label: Security Settings
security.description: Login logs, device management, and future controls

tenantSettings.label: Tenant Settings
tenantSettings.description: Language, timezone, and dangerous tenant cancellation

hero.title: Sign in to Vxture Admin.
hero.description: Access models, skills, third-party agents, and platform supply-side capabilities from one controlled entry point.

card.title: Sign in
card.description: Use your account to continue to the platform operations portal.

dashboard.title: Account and tenant console
dashboard.description: A self-service entry for users and tenants to manage members, subscriptions, billing, quotas, and security posture.

plan.label: Current plan
plan.hint: Renews on May 18, 2026 with pooled workspace billing.

quota.label: Quota health
quota.hint: Inference remains healthy, but GPU tuning is approaching alert range.

reminders.label: Open reminders
reminders.hint: One invoice, one invite, and one quota threshold need review.

quickActions.title: Quick actions
quickActions.description: Guide frequent management actions without flooding the page with primary buttons.

addMember.label: Add member
addMember.description: Invite operators, workspace owners, and readonly reviewers.

reviewSubscription.label: Review subscription
reviewSubscription.description: Inspect plan details, renewal timing, and quota pool pressure.

adjustQuotas.label: Adjust quotas
adjustQuotas.description: Rebalance shared limits before overage costs increase.

signals.title: Signals
signals.description: Keep the dashboard concise: only what needs attention now.

billing.title: Billing follow-up
billing.description: An invoice for model overage is due within 5 days.

quota.title: Quota hotspot
quota.description: Fine-tune GPU hours are nearing the configured monthly cap.

access.title: Access hygiene
access.description: Two invited members have not accepted access yet.

invoices.title: Recent invoices
invoices.description: Subscription and overage charges stay secondary to plan status.

quotas.title: Quota posture
quotas.description: Usage remains visible, but not as an oversized ops dashboard.

settings.title: Tenant settings
settings.description: Configure tenant-level policies, access controls, security constraints, and audit rules.

inviteApproval.title: Invite approval
inviteApproval.hint: Member invitations require admin confirmation before joining the tenant.

externalMembers.title: External members
externalMembers.hint: Allow accounts outside the organization domain to join this tenant.

defaultRole.title: Default role
defaultRole.hint: Initial role granted to a member after accepting an invitation.

mfaRequired.title: Require MFA
mfaRequired.hint: Require additional verification when members sign in to the console.

trustedDeviceReview.title: New device review
trustedDeviceReview.hint: Record first-time device sign-ins for later review.

sessionTimeout.title: Session lifetime
sessionTimeout.hint: Maximum time a console session can stay signed in.

auditRetention.title: Audit retention
auditRetention.hint: How long tenant operation logs are retained by the platform.

exportApproval.title: Export approval
exportApproval.hint: Require confirmation before exporting members, billing, or audit data.

apiKeyCreation.title: API key self-service
apiKeyCreation.hint: Allow members to create integration access keys by themselves.

cancelTenant.title: Cancel tenant
cancelTenant.confirmHint: Requires secondary confirmation and the current tenant name before execution.

topics.title: Subscription topics

feedback.saved: Notification preferences were saved to local frontend state and will sync to the server after backend support lands.

contact.description: Used for notifications, account recovery, and localized display.

header.title: Organization
header.description: The organization is the current tenant for now. Review the logo, verification state, contact address, and localization settings.

foundation.title: Foundation
foundation.description: Organization and tenant are treated as one entity; multiple tenants under one organization are not modeled yet.

contact.title: Contact & address
